mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_orders WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_orders WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status = #{status}
SELECT status AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM repair_orders WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC, status ASC
SELECT category AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM repair_orders WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC, category ASC
SELECT dorm_building AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM repair_orders WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY dorm_building ORDER BY count DESC, dorm_building ASC

WITH RECURSIVE dates AS ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL (#{days} - 1) DAY) AS stat_date UNION ALL SELECT DATE_ADD(stat_date, INTERVAL 1 DAY) FROM dates WHERE stat_date < CURDATE() ) SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.stat_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN DATE(o.created_at) = d.stat_date THEN o.id END) AS created_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN DATE(o.completed_at) = d.stat_date AND o.status = 'COMPLETED' THEN o.id END) AS completed_count FROM dates d LEFT JOIN repair_orders o ON o.deleted_at IS NULL AND ( DATE(o.created_at) = d.stat_date OR DATE(o.completed_at) = d.stat_date ) GROUP BY d.stat_date ORDER BY d.stat_date ASC

SELECT u.id AS repairer_id, u.real_name AS repairer_name, SUM(CASE WHEN o.status IN ('ASSIGNED', 'PROCESSING', 'WAIT_CONFIRM', 'NEED_REASSIGN') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_count, SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_count, ROUND(AVG(f.score), 2) AS average_score FROM users u LEFT JOIN repair_orders o ON o.repairer_id = u.id AND o.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN repair_feedbacks f ON f.order_id = o.id WHERE u.role = 'REPAIR' AND u.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY u.id, u.real_name ORDER BY completed_count DESC, active_count DESC, u.id ASC
